title: Preprocessor Lexer is not keeping track of braces depth level

features.name: macro definition with backtick-escaped template argument
features.description: Code should include a macro definition using backtick escaping in the template argument

features.name: macro invocation with brace-containing argument using inside operator
features.description: Code should include a macro invocation where the argument contains brace-enclosed expressions like inside{...} that require brace depth tracking
